_meta._comment: Shared family notes for the Oregon trip. The dashboard auto-loads this on first visit. Use Export to save changes back here, then commit & push to GitHub.

schedule.text: Sunday, Aug 2: group day at Heceta Head Lighthouse (free). One family heads home that evening, around the little kids' bedtime.
schedule.author: Plan

schedule.text: Dad wants to alternate long and short driving days. Revisit how we split the legs (currently 425 mi then 326 mi out; 326 then 425 back).
schedule.author: Dad

schedule.text: Dad has the list of who gets which campsite at Harbor Vista.
schedule.author: Dad

questions.text: Which days for: Sea Lion Caves, Cape Perpetua + whale watching, Newport Aquarium, outlet stores, and the Hobbit Trail?
questions.author: Group

questions.text: Group dinners: who's cooking which night? Each family handles their own breakfast & lunch; sign up to cook one group dinner.
questions.author: Group

questions.text: Mila sent a list of food suggestions — add them to the plan.
questions.author: Mila

questions.text: Chicken place near Florence — get the name & address, then add it to the wish list.
questions.author: Group

questions.text: Mo's is on the plan — pick which night(s) to go. We could eat out more than once.
questions.author: Group
